title: Elisinandrox
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Elisinandrox''' was a chemical compound that helped to resist [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] sickness in a subject exposed to the harmful effects of radiation. It cost 250 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per dose and the effect lasted for ten standard hours. Elisinandrox could be applied by the [[Cyduct E-23 Booster]] interdermal injection system.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]''
*<!-- 1998-04-XX -->''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''
